# GardenLayoutTips

Expert vegetable garden planning tools and guides.

## Core Content
- [Home](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/) - Main landing page with featured articles and garden knowledge base.
- [About](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/about) - Our mission to empower gardeners.
- [Blog](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/blog) - Comprehensive guides on vegetable garden layouts.
- [Guides](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/guides) - Expert planting and layout guides.
- [Planner](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/planner) - Interactive garden layout planner tool.
- [Contact](https://gardenlayouttips.vercel.app/contact) - Get in touch with our team.

## Key Topics
- Vegetable Garden Layout Ideas
- Small Backyard Layouts
- Raised Bed Gardening
- Companion Planting
- Soil Health & Fertility
- Space Optimization
- Seasonal Planning
